clusters.justification: These terms map onto limbic and anterior insula-cingulate co-activations, representing the broad functional domain of processing emotional valence, arousal, and mood.
Rooted in fronto-striatal and orbitofrontal circuitry, these terms reflect the overarching computation of subjective value to guide motivated behavior and goal-directed choices.
These terms reliably co-activate within the Default Mode Network, reflecting the generation of internal abstract representations concerning the self, other agents, and interpersonal narratives.
